title: Origins: Skybreaker
description: An aerial Origin known for its grand entrances from the sky and its devastating flurries of slashes that leave its prey crippled.
body:
# Skybreaker ✨
(Impact: 2)

_『 Avian tribesmen, the Skybreakers strike from above with earth-splitting strength. 』_

An aerial Origin with an Ambush/Hit'n'Run playstyle. It excels at airborne mobility with innate Elytra flight.

~~------------------------------------------------------------~~

**〚 ✨ 〛Soaring Above**

_A winged being, you can soar as long as your heart desires._

> You have Elytra wings without needing to equip any.
> 
> You can boost forward if gliding with  `[Secondary]`. Costs hunger unless used within 10s of Windburst (see later).

~~------------------------------------------------------------~~

**〚 💨 〛Aerial Brilliance**

_Your wings glow ever-so-brilliantly in the sky, pulsing with energy._

> You accumulate Aeria if gliding. Aeria increases movement speed.

~~------------------------------------------------------------~~

**〚 🔱 〛Split the Earth**

_Crashing down from the sky, your strikes shake earth itself._

> You can launch forward while gliding and facing down:
> 
> »» Upon landing, a shockwave knocks all but the nearest enemy away. The nearest enemy gains 🔱 Assault Mark (immune to knockback & +60% melee damage taken; after it expires, blocks healing for +6s) instead.
> 
> »» No fall/kinetic damage from landing.

~~------------------------------------------------------------~~

**〚 ⚪ 〛Windburst**

_Sticking to the ground isn't for you: you depart to the air with ease._

> You can launch yourself upward at the cost of a quarter of Aeria.
> 
> »» Gain +150% Air Speed on Soaring Above's boost for 2s and +300% Aeria for 10s after.

~~------------------------------------------------------------~~

**〚 😮‍💨 〛Poised Breathing**

_On the ground, you lose your grace._

> You gain +50% Attack Speed. Every attack drains your Aeria.
> 
> »» Without Aeria, you lose 50% Attack Speed instead.

~~------------------------------------------------------------~~

**〚 ⛓️ 〛Need for Mobility**

_With great burden comes... lack of wings._

> Your cannot wear armor better than chainmail.
